skill.name: frontend-design
skill.description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, or applications. Generates creative, polished code that avoids generic AI aesthetics.
skill.summary: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality using bold aesthetic choices, unique typography, and cohesive visual design.
skill.author: am-will

security_audit.summary: Static analysis detected 15 patterns (weak cryptographic algorithm, system reconnaissance) but all are false positives. The skill is a frontend design guide - words like 'code' (source code), 'cryptographic', 'context' triggered false positive matches. No actual security risks found. Skill is safe for publication.

high_findings.title: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm (FALSE POSITIVE)
high_findings.description: Static scanner misidentified 'code' (source code), 'cryptographic', 'crypto' as cryptographic code. This is a frontend design skill - 'code' refers to HTML/CSS/JS source code, not cryptographic algorithms.
high_findings.confidence_reasoning: The word 'code' appears 9 times in context of 'source code' (HTML/CSS/JS), not cryptographic code. No cryptographic operations present.

high_findings.title: System Reconnaissance (FALSE POSITIVE)
high_findings.description: Static scanner misidentified design thinking terms like 'context', 'understanding' as system reconnaissance. This skill guides creative frontend design, not system scanning.
high_findings.confidence_reasoning: Words like 'context' and 'understanding' refer to design context and requirements, not system scanning. No network or file system scanning present.

content.value_statement: Build distinctive frontend interfaces that avoid generic AI aesthetics. This skill guides creative design choices with bold typography, cohesive color themes, and polished animations for memorable user experiences.
actual_capabilities: Generate production-grade HTML, CSS, and JavaScript code
Create distinctive visual designs with unique typography and color schemes
Build cohesive aesthetic themes using CSS variables
Design memorable layouts with unexpected compositions
Apply design thinking for bold creative directions
limitations: Does not generate backend code or server-side logic
Does not access external design resources or APIs
Cannot test designs in real browsers or devices

use_cases.title: Build a Landing Page
use_cases.description: Create a visually striking landing page for a product or service with unique typography, bold color choices, and engaging animations.

use_cases.title: Design a Component Library
use_cases.description: Develop a cohesive set of UI components (buttons, cards, forms) with consistent design language and interactive states.

use_cases.title: Prototype an Application UI
use_cases.description: Rapidly prototype a full application interface with multiple pages, navigation, and interactive elements.

prompt_templates.title: Simple Component
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a [component name] with a [specific aesthetic direction]. Use [framework or plain HTML/CSS]. Focus on distinctive typography and cohesive color scheme.

prompt_templates.title: Landing Page
prompt_templates.prompt: Design a landing page for [product/service]. Choose an extreme aesthetic direction like [brutalist/minimalist/retro-futuristic]. Include hero section, features, and call-to-action. Use [framework] with custom CSS.

prompt_templates.title: Design System
prompt_templates.prompt: Build a small design system with [number] components. Each should follow [aesthetic theme]. Include buttons, cards, inputs, and a navigation component. Use CSS variables for theming.

prompt_templates.title: Full Page Application
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a [application type] interface with multiple views. Aesthetic direction: [specific style]. Include [list of features]. Use [framework]. Focus on motion, spatial composition, and attention to detail.

output_examples.input: Create a button component with a luxury aesthetic
output_examples.output: A polished button with refined typography, subtle gold accents, smooth hover transitions, and a refined shadow that creates depth without heaviness.

output_examples.input: Design a landing page for a tech startup
output_examples.output: A bold, dark-themed landing page with geometric patterns, neon accent colors, staggered reveal animations on scroll, and an asymmetrical hero section.

output_examples.input: Build a card component for a blog
output_examples.output: An elegant card with distinctive serif typography, generous whitespace, subtle texture background, and a smooth lift animation on hover.

best_practices: Commit to a clear aesthetic direction before coding and execute it with precision throughout
Choose distinctive typography - pair a unique display font with a refined body font
Use animation purposefully: one well-orchestrated page load creates more impact than scattered micro-interactions
anti_patterns: Using generic fonts like Inter, Roboto, or system defaults that lack character
Defaulting to purple gradients or cliched color schemes
Creating predictable, symmetrical layouts without visual interest or tension

faq.question: What frameworks does this skill support?
faq.answer: The skill works with any frontend framework (React, Vue, Svelte) or plain HTML/CSS/JS. It focuses on design principles that apply universally.

faq.question: How is this different from regular code generation?
faq.answer: This skill emphasizes creative design choices, unique aesthetics, and attention to visual details rather than generating generic, cookie-cutter code.

faq.question: Can this skill help with accessibility?
faq.answer: The skill focuses on visual design. Accessibility considerations like ARIA labels and semantic HTML should be handled separately.

faq.question: Does this skill generate responsive designs?
faq.answer: The skill can incorporate responsive patterns, but explicit mobile/desktop considerations should be specified in the requirements.

faq.question: How do I get distinctive design ideas?
faq.answer: The skill guides you to choose extreme aesthetic directions (brutalist, maximalist, luxury, etc.) and commit fully to them for memorable results.

faq.question: Can this skill create dark mode designs?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill explicitly encourages varying between light and dark themes and can implement cohesive dark mode using CSS variables.
